PlayerPrompt.Hint: Or type /roll {die} in chat, or use the Roll-Offs sidebar tab.

ShowChatButton.Name: Show Chat Button
ShowChatButton.Hint: Show the Roll-Offs button in the chat controls.

ShowPlayerPrompt.Name: Show Roll Prompt
ShowPlayerPrompt.Hint: Open a prompt when it is your turn to roll in a roll-off.

PostPerRollCard.Name: Post Per-Roll Cards
PostPerRollCard.Hint: Post a standard chat roll card for each participant's roll.

DefaultDieType.Name: Default Die Type
DefaultDieType.Hint: Default die type used when starting a new roll-off.

ShowSidebarTab.Name: Show Sidebar Tab
ShowSidebarTab.Hint: Show the Roll-Offs tab in the sidebar between Chat and Combat.

IncludeGMByDefault.Name: Include GM by Default
IncludeGMByDefault.Hint: Check the GM as a participant by default when configuring a new roll-off.

Chat.RollOffStartedBody: Round {round} of {total}. Participants: {participants}. Roll by clicking the prompt, the sidebar tab, or typing /roll {die}.

Errors.NeedTwoParticipants: A roll-off needs at least two participants.
Errors.OnlyGmStarts: Only the GM can start a roll-off.
Errors.AlreadyRolled: You have already rolled this round.
Errors.NotParticipant: You are not a participant in this round.
Errors.DiePatternMismatch: That roll does not match the configured die pattern ({pattern}).
